rationale.root_cause: The response incorrectly identifies the root cause as a memory leak in test_basic.c, which is unrelated to the specified bug in ucl_parser.c.
rationale.local_fix: The suggested local fix addresses a memory management issue in test_basic.c, not the required change in ucl_parser.c at line 1662.
rationale.global_fix: The global fix proposal involves redesigning the buffering strategy in test_basic.c, which does not address the root cause of the bug in ucl_parser.c.
